expectations.text: behavioral_check: Identifies LFPBandV1 as Computed; user populates it after inserting LFPBandSelection
expectations.evidence: 'LFPBandV1 is a compute (Computed) table... populate it yourself for any new band you want'. Section 'What this means in practice' shows the LFPBandSelection().set_lfp_band_electrodes(...) → LFPBandV1.populate(key) sequence.

expectations.text: behavioral_check: Notes there is no merge wrapper — LFPBandV1 itself is the consumer-facing endpoint
expectations.evidence: Explicitly: 'LFPBandV1 is *not* a part of any merge table — band-filtered LFP has no merge layer above it; downstream consumers (e.g. RippleLFPSelection) FK directly to LFPBandV1.'

expectations.text: behavioral_check: Does not invent an `LFPBandOutput` merge/output table, `lfp_band_merge` module, or merge_get_part workflow for LFPBandV1
